chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 507 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 11.12.2023 Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicant submits that respondents have been acquitted by the trial Court; hence, he does not press this application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
